title: Together for a Future of Possibilities!
markdown:
# Together for a Future of Possibilities!

An MoU was signed between Lahore Leads University and Govt of Punjab Honhaar Undergraduate Scholarship Program. Mr. Hamza Zahoor Wattoo, President Lahore Leads University and Rana Sikandar Hayat, Minister for Education Department, Punjab signed the MoU.

The Honhaar Scholarship Program presents a significant opportunity for deserving students to support their academic journey. This Scholarship program will cover 100% tuition fee.

# To apply for this scholarship opportunity kindly visit _**[https://apply.leads.edu.pk/registration](https://apply.leads.edu.pk/registration?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAAR3kUKBSgGBaFbSw1zTaZ3oryoR54j_W-JosbR5rg6GzjdvWmPiiTUdKBwk_aem_1skuiJWKs8x1TXtYxtyFSQ)**_
